# services.hitch

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.hitch`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.hitch.backend` | `string` | The host and port Hitch connects to when receiving a connection in the form \[HOST\]:PORT |
| `services.hitch.ciphers` | `string` | The list of ciphers to use |
| `services.hitch.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Hitch Server. |
| `services.hitch.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Additional configuration lines |
| `services.hitch.frontend` | `string or list of string` | The port and interface of the listen endpoint in the form \[HOST\]:PORT[+CERT]. |
| `services.hitch.group` | `string` | The group to run as |
| `services.hitch.ocsp-stapling.enabled` | `boolean` | Whether to enable OCSP Stapling |
| `services.hitch.pem-files` | `list of absolute path` | PEM files to use |
| `services.hitch.user` | `string` | The user to run as |
